params.name: externalId
params.description: The external ID used to look up the profile. Format is type:value, such as user_id:abc123, email:user@example.com, or anonymous_id:xyz789.

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of trait names to include in the response. Recommended for best performance.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: next
params.description: Pagination cursor to retrieve the next page of results.

items.docs: Returns the traits for a user profile identified by an external ID. The external ID format is type:value, such as user_id:abc123 or email:user@example.com. Use the include parameter to specify which traits to retrieve for optimal performance.

params.name: externalId
params.description: The external ID used to look up the profile. Format is type:value, such as user_id:abc123, email:user@example.com, or anonymous_id:xyz789.

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of trait names to include.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: next
params.description: Pagination cursor to retrieve the next page of results.

items.docs: Returns the traits for an account profile identified by an external ID. Account profiles are group-level profiles that aggregate data across users.

params.name: externalId
params.description: The external ID used to look up the profile. Format is type:value, such as user_id:abc123, email:user@example.com, or anonymous_id:xyz789.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: next
params.description: Pagination cursor to retrieve the next page of results.

items.docs: Returns the events for a user profile identified by an external ID. Events represent the actions the user has taken and are returned in reverse chronological order.

params.name: externalId
params.description: The external ID used to look up the profile. Format is type:value, such as user_id:abc123, email:user@example.com, or anonymous_id:xyz789.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: next
params.description: Pagination cursor to retrieve the next page of results.

items.docs: Returns the external identifiers linked to a user profile. External IDs include user IDs, anonymous IDs, email addresses, and other identifiers that have been associated with the profile through identity resolution.

params.name: externalId
params.description: The external ID used to look up the profile. Format is type:value, such as user_id:abc123, email:user@example.com, or anonymous_id:xyz789.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: next
params.description: Pagination cursor to retrieve the next page of results.

items.docs: Returns the external identifiers linked to an account profile.

params.name: externalId
params.description: The external ID used to look up the profile. Format is type:value, such as user_id:abc123, email:user@example.com, or anonymous_id:xyz789.

items.docs: Returns metadata for a user profile, including when the profile was created, last updated, and the total count of events and traits.

params.name: externalId
params.description: The external ID used to look up the profile. Format is type:value, such as user_id:abc123, email:user@example.com, or anonymous_id:xyz789.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: next
params.description: Pagination cursor to retrieve the next page of results.

items.docs: Returns the linked profiles for a user, such as account-level profiles that the user belongs to.
